name: No Cook "Marshmallow" Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the salt and egg whites together using an electric mixer until soft peaks form.
2. Gradually add sugar, about 1 tablespoon at a time, beating until smooth and glossy.
3. Continue beating, then gradually add corn syrup, a little at a time, beating after each addition until the frosting reaches stiff peaks. This will make enough frosting to cover a 9-inch layer cake.
